inventory.noPromptsHint: run `aitap scan` to discover prompts in this project
inventory.noPipelinesHint: pipelines are discovered when prompts share data flow

prompt.noVersionsYet: no versions recorded yet — edit & save in the playground to create v1
prompt.noParentToDiff: no parent version to diff against
prompt.diffBody: A graphical diff view is on the M4 roadmap. For now, run the CLI command below to see a unified diff of every message and parameter change between these two versions:

pipeline.selectedEdgeSubtitle: click an edge in the DAG to inspect

playground.autoIterateDisabledTitle: select a prompt target to enable auto-iterate
playground.pickANodeSubtitle: click one node to run it in isolation
playground.pickASegmentSubtitle: click nodes to include; outputs flow along edges within the set
playground.notContiguous: these nodes aren't connected — they'll run as independent groups
playground.emptyHint: pick a target, add cases, then hit run
playground.skeletonHint: this will keep the result table area reserved while the run completes

history.noPromptsToShow: no prompts to show history for
history.landingSubtitle: pick a prompt to see its version timeline
history.noPromptSelectedHint: open a prompt from the inventory to view its history
history.noEarlierToDiff: no earlier version to diff against
history.scoreHistoryEmpty: score history will appear here once iterations run
history.diffFooter: full text diff lands with the version-content endpoint (M3). for now, run
history.diffFooterEnd: to see the prompt body delta in your terminal.

audit.auditRemoteRepoSubtitle: clones into a temp dir, runs L1 scan, prints a report, cleans up

caseEditor.title: dataset
caseEditor.defaultSubtitle: one JSON object per case · keys map to template vars
caseEditor.noCasesYet: no cases yet — add one to enable run
caseEditor.errorNotObject: case must be a JSON object of {variable: value}

results.defaultEmptyHint: no results yet — run something to populate this table

iterate.launchSubtitle: run a self-iteration session against the selected dataset
iterate.datasetHintSuffix: CLI to create a dataset, or provide an existing name.
iterate.modeHintAuto: critic LLM rewrites freely based on judge feedback — fully automatic.
iterate.modeHintGuided: critic LLM follows your direction — provide a single-sentence instruction.
iterate.modeHintManual: no LLM rewrite — you supply the new prompt body verbatim for round 2.
iterate.instructionPlaceholder: e.g. tone should be more professional
iterate.instructionRequired: instruction is required for guided mode
iterate.manualPlaceholder: the full new prompt body — replaces the baseline verbatim for round 2
iterate.manualRequired: manual mode needs the new prompt body
iterate.manualHint: multi-round manual lands in a follow-up — for now this becomes round 2 only.
iterate.errorPromptDataset: prompt + dataset must be selected before starting

convergence.maxRoundsHint: loop stops after N rounds regardless of score
convergence.deltaHint: round N total − baseline total ≥ this ⇒ converge
convergence.stagnationWindowHint: rounds we need to plateau before stopping
convergence.stagnationEpsilonHint: round-over-round delta below this counts as no movement

iterationProgress.reasonDeltaTitle: score improved past the delta threshold
iterationProgress.reasonDeltaDetail: weighted score rose above baseline by the configured delta — the iteration succeeded.
iterationProgress.reasonAbsoluteDetail: an opt-in non-negotiable dimension (e.g. safety) cleared its absolute bar.
iterationProgress.reasonStagnationDetail: round-over-round delta dropped below the stagnation epsilon — further rounds unlikely to help.
iterationProgress.reasonMaxRoundsDetail: the loop ran the configured number of rounds without crossing the delta threshold.
iterationProgress.reasonCriticFailedDetail: the rewriter LLM call could not produce a valid revision — see critique text below for the failure detail.
iterationProgress.title: auto-iterate
iterationProgress.subtitleFailed: session failed — see error detail below
iterationProgress.waitingFirstRound: waiting for the first round to land…

iterationTimeline.emptyHint: start an auto-iterate session from the playground to populate this timeline.
iterationTimeline.chartLabel: weighted score per round for this session

settings.title: API keys
settings.subtitle: Where aitap stores your provider API keys, and how to test them.
settings.defaultsSubtitle: Used for deep scan, prompt runs, and the iteration judge. Saved to .aitap/config.yaml — survives restarts.
settings.defaultsJudgeBlankHint: Leave blank to reuse the default model. Common:
settings.missingKeyBanner: No API key is set. Some features (deep scan, runs) won't work until you add one in Settings.
settings.playgroundMissingKey: This run needs a {{provider}} key. Add one in Settings.
settings.providerCardSubtitleFallback: Saved to a file in your home directory.
settings.saveFailure: Couldn't save the key. Try again.
settings.clearFailure: Couldn't remove the key. Try again.
settings.testFail: The test failed. Open Settings to retry.
settings.noKeyHint: No key set — runs that need {{provider}} will be skipped.
settings.fallbackConfirmBody: Aitap can't reach your system keychain on this machine. We can save the key to a file in your home folder — only you can read it. Continue?
settings.profilesSubtitle: Each profile is one endpoint + key + model. Pick which one runs by default at the top.
settings.profilesEmpty: No profiles yet. Add one below to get started.
settings.profilesDeleteConfirmBody: {{label}} will be removed and its key will be deleted from your system keychain. You can re-add it any time.
settings.profilesEditSubtitle: Update the endpoint, model, or key. The profile id stays the same so any defaults pointing at it still work.
settings.profilesEditFailure: Couldn't save the changes. Try again.
settings.profilesCreateSubtitle: Give it a label, paste your key, and pick which API it speaks. Start from a template to skip the URL.
settings.profilesCreateFailure: Couldn't add the profile. Check the fields and try again.
settings.profilesCreateNoPresets: No templates yet — add one in Manage templates.
settings.presetsManageSubtitle: Edit, remove, or add presets. The chips above this form pull from this list.
settings.presetsManageFailure: Couldn't save the templates. Try again.
settings.presetsManageResetConfirmBody: Your custom templates will be replaced with the 11 starter rows aitap ships. You can edit them again afterwards.
settings.presetsManageEmpty: No templates. Click Add template or Restore defaults to get started.
settings.defaultsCardSubtitle: Pick the profile aitap uses by default. Saved to .aitap/config.yaml.
settings.defaultsCardModelHint: Used for prompt runs, deep scan, and the iteration loop.
settings.defaultsCardJudgeHint: Used to score iteration rounds. Leave blank to reuse the default model.
settings.defaultsCardNoProfilesHint: No profiles configured yet. Add one below first.
settings.defaultsCardFailure: Couldn't save the defaults. Try again.
settings.missingProfilesBanner: No model profile is set up yet. Deep scan and prompt runs need at least one — add one in Settings.
settings.missingDefaultBanner: No default model is picked yet. Open Settings and choose one so runs know which profile to use.

downstream.warning: the new prompt version was committed without re-running these downstream consumers. their scores may have shifted.
